properties.name: anchor
properties.description: ID of, or HTML element itself, to anchor the Color Picker's popup to. Prefer using the `anchor` slot.

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the open state of the Color Picker's popup

properties.name: placement
properties.description: Preferred placement of the Color Picker's popup in relation to the anchor element

properties.name: swatches
properties.description: Sets a color palette from which users can select colors

properties.name: swatches-per-row
properties.description: Sets the number of swatches to be displayed per row in the color palette grid

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the element. When specified in the HTML, corresponds to the initial value

events.name: change
events.description: Fires a custom 'change' event when the `value` of an element has changed

events.name: input
events.description: Fires a custom 'input' event immediately when the `value` has changed
